headline: Stock Market Week Ahead: Marvell, Dell And The Fed's Inflation Gauge
summary: The stock market is right at highs with several leaders near buy points. Marvell, Dell and Costco earnings are on tap, along with the Fed's inflation gauge.

headline: FedEx-led $9 billion buyout offer for InPost opens May 26
summary: The all-cash bid of €15.60 per share needs 80% of InPost shareholders to tender for the deal to close

headline: FedEx-Led $9 Billion Buyout Offer Window For Polish Parcel Firm InPost Opens May-End
summary: A consortium spearheaded by FedEx (NYSE:FDX) has put forward an approximately €7.8 billion (around $9.06 billion) acquisition proposal for Polish parcel locker firm InPost. The buyout proposal, initially announced in February and unanimously endorsed by InPost’s board, is anticipated to run from May 26 to July 27. Regulatory approvals for the transaction have already been obtained in China, Israel, Italy, Turkey, and Ukraine. The European Commission and Vietnam are expected to complete their rev

headline: Trump said he'd 'remember' companies that didn't apply for tariff refunds. Many of them are anyway
summary: Walmart confirmed to CNBC it has sought a tariff refund and plans to use any money it receives back to invest in lower prices for shoppers.
